128*floor(1/64*$T0) + 4*floor(1/16*Mod($T0, 64)) + 128*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32) + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32)), Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32) > 0 & $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) >= 0), (Mod(floor(1/32*$WG0 + 1/32*$WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)), ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)), True))
4
64*$T1 + Mod($T0, 16) + 256*Piecewise((32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32)) + Mod($WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32), Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32)), Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32) > 0 & $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) >= 0), (32*floor(1/32*$WG1 + 1/32*$WG0*1/ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)) + Mod($WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32), 32), True))
1
16 + 64*$T1 + Mod($T0, 16) + 256*Piecewise((32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32)) + Mod($WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32), Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32)), Mod(ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32), 32) > 0 & $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) - 32*floor(1/32*ceiling(1/8*_N_div_32))*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32) >= 0), (32*floor(1/32*$WG1 + 1/32*$WG0*1/ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32)) + Mod($WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/4*_M_div_32), 32), True))

BLOCK_M*Piecewise((floor($WG0*1/Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) + $WG1*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N))*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), $WG0 + $WG1*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M) - GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N))*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M) >= 0 & -Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0), (Mod(floor($WG0*1/GROUP_SIZE_N + $WG1*1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M)), ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M)), True)) - BLOCK_M*Piecewise((floor(-GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N))*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M)*1/Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N)), -Mod(ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N), GROUP_SIZE_N) < 0 & GROUP_SIZE_N*floor(1/GROUP_SIZE_N*ceiling(1/BLOCK_N*N))*ceiling(1/BLOCK_M*M) <= 0), (0, True))
